name: Boots of Striding and Springing
overview: These boots enhance movement speed and jumping ability.

properties.speed_increase: While you wear these boots, your Speed becomes 30 feet unless your Speed is higher
properties.carrying_capacity: Your Speed isn't reduced by you carrying weight in excess of your carrying capacity or wearing Heavy Armor
properties.enhanced_jumping: Once on each of your turns, you can jump up to 30 feet by spending only 10 feet of movement
